prompt: A highly realistic, photorealistic macro close-up photograph of one page in a paper currency collection album. On the left side, from top to bottom: the front sides of the 500 USD bill (William McKinley), 1,000 USD bill (Grover Cleveland), 5,000 USD bill (James Madison), and 10,000 USD bill (Salmon P. Chase). All signatures on the bills are changed to KanaWorks_AI. On the right side, from top to bottom: the back sides of the same bills in the same order (500, 1,000, 5,000, 10,000 USD). The banknotes are in near-uncirculated condition. Each bill is encapsulated in a clear protective holder with colorful grading labels attached, and the labels display all key information.
